subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of the Abhá Beauty! Thy letter was received. The glance of the Blessed Beauty's favor encompasseth thee, and His bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان جمال ابهی نامه شما رسید نظر عنایت جمال مبارک شامل است و الطاف
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @importance of community building, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
